title: sourcing map 8-Pin S-Video DIN Socket Female Jack Socket Connector Panel Mount Soldering for Audio/Signal Connector,Pack of 4 Silver Tone
features: Panel mount socket female is used to transmit digital real-time music information, suitable for audio video equipment, suitable for various electronic devices, including audio video equipment, AV equipment, TV, LCD TV, LCD monitor, set-top box, DVD player, DVR recorder, consumer electronics, home theater, car audio, etc.

Female Jack Socket; Number of Pins:8pin; Color:Silver Tone; Mounting Seat Diameter:15mm/0.59 inch; Installation hole distance:22mm/0.87 inch; Size:28mmx19mmx18mm/1.1x0.75x0.71 inch(L*W*H); In the package of:4pcs x DIN Female Panel Mount

DIN panel mount socket mainly adopts metal shell to protect the plug connection, not easy to deform, high temperature resistance, the socket is designed for easy installation, with two mounting holes, can be firmly fixed to the panel, housing or chassis, nickel-plated metal structure has excellent durability and corrosion resistance, ensuring long-term performance.
Female connector adapter can be fixed with nut to expand DIN video connection port and facilitate the connection of audio equipment
Please pay attention to the product size before purchasing.
